lock_of_the_week: ShawSwank Redemption (-360) over The Polar Express — Lock of da week, cher, save ya money for boudin, that's true. ShawSwank just upset CLAUDE 7-6 and dey ridin' a hot offensive bounce (11 HR, .260 AVG) on top of dey usual elite pitching (7 W, 7 QS, 5 SV+H last week). Polar is 1-10 on da season AND dey just got demolished 11-3 by Spoons. Sha, dey ain't recoverin' from da May trade — gutted rotation, no bullpen, no offense. I gar-on-tee, that's true.

matchups.blurb: Mais sha, da newly-renamed Exxon Valdez (sha, named after Framber, dat's commitment to da bit, mon ami) is finally lookin' like da team da trade promised. Valdez just had dey best pitching week of da season (65.2 IP, 5 QS, 3.84 ERA, 1.10 WHIP, 3.56 K/BB) and dey still leadin' da league in FIVE offensive categories — R, HR, RBI, SV+H, AND OBP. Sha, dat's a complete team, I gar-on-tee. Duran came off a win over Y&Y but dey pitching is a CATASTROPHE — last week was 5.89 ERA, 1.37 WHIP, 2 QS. Cumulative bottom-three in WHIP, K/BB, SLG. Duran gon' steal SB and SV+H. Valdez gon' take everything else. Pick: Exxon Valdez by way of a heapin' bowl of seafood gumbo wit' shrimp AND oysters AND crabs, that's true.

OOO WEE, cher, dis is da textbook offense-vs-pitching matchup, that's true. Spoons leads da league in ERA, WHIP, K, AND QS — four #1 rate-cat finishes, sha, dat's elite pitching like Mawmaw's roux dat's been simmerin' for three hours. Last week Spoons demolished Polar 11-3-2 wit' 71 IP, 6 W, 76 K, 3.30 ERA. Y&Y leads da league in R AND RBI cumulatively and ranks 2nd in AVG — da bats are real. But da pitching is bottom-three in QS, WHIP, K/BB and last week posted a 6.43 ERA in 42 IP, ooo wee, dat's almost as bad as forgettin' da Tabasco at da boil. Spoons takes all four pitching cats AND da two rate-stat hitting cats. Y&Y wins R, HR, RBI, SB. Pick: Spoons by way of a slow-cooked andouille étouffée, mais oui, that's true.

Mais cher, dis is da MARQUEE matchup of da week — #2 vs #5, da two pitching-led teams in da middle of da contender pack, that's true. Caminero is 8-2-1 in da actual record but da power says dey 5th. Burns is 6-3-2 and ranked #2. Burns leads da league in K/BB AND ranks 2nd in SV+H, 3rd in W and K, top-4 in WHIP and QS — sha, da pitching profile is da most complete in da league, I gar-on-tee. Caminero ranks top-4 in HR, K, ERA but da WHIP slipped to 7th, K/BB to 9th. Last week Caminero pitched bad (4.99 ERA, 2.06 K/BB, only 3 QS). Burns' bats are weak (10th in SB, 11th in RBI) but da pitching gives 'em a higher floor. Caminero needs HR AND offensive volume to make up da rate-cat gap. Pick: Burns by a nose, like winnin' a domino game on da last bone, c'est bon, that's true.

team_a.name: Camp of the New Orleans Saints

matchups.blurb: Sha, dis is two middle-tier teams both ranked top-8 in K AND top-7 in K/BB cumulatively, so it's gon' be a strikeout fest at da plate, that's true. Balls just upset Burns 9-5 and dey ranked 2nd in W, 2nd in QS, 3rd in ERA, top-5 in K. Last week pitching was excellent (3.66 ERA, 1.26 WHIP, 7 QS) and bats showed up (44 R, 9 HR, .254 AVG). Camp just got beat by Valdez 4-9-3 wit' a 5.49 ERA in 77 IP — sha, dat's dey worst pitching week of da month, ooo wee. Camp leads in nuttin' but ranks top-7 in K, HR, K/BB. Balls' pitching edge is da difference. Pick: Balls by way of a chargrilled oysters platter at Drago's, that's true.

WOOO DOGGY, cher, dis is da MARQUEE matchup of da week — PO' BOYD comin' off da upset of Caminero against da #1 power team in da league, that's true. CLAUDE is da #1 team (power 136) — top-2 in K, HR, RBI, ERA, WHIP, AVG, OBP, SLG, SB, AND R. Sha, dat's TEN top-2 finishes in fourteen cats, mon ami, dat's an absurd profile, I gar-on-tee. Last week CLAUDE STILL had a great line (.293 AVG, 10 HR, 11 SB, 5 W) — dey just got out-volumed by ShawSwank. PO' BOYD is comin' off a complete week (38 R, 11 HR, .246 AVG, 5 W, 6 QS) and leads da league in SLG, top-3 in HR and AVG. But CLAUDE's edge in SB (1st), K (2nd), ERA (2nd), WHIP (2nd), K/BB (4th) is overwhelming. PO' BOYD's K/BB is last in da league, dat's a free cat for CLAUDE. Pick: CLAUDE 4 COMMISH by way of a long Galatoire's lunch wit' wine, dessert, AND da check, that's true.

Mais oui, dis is da LOCK of da week, save ya money for crawfish, that's true. ShawSwank just upset CLAUDE 7-6 and dey ridin' a HUGE bounce in da bats (11 HR, .260, .346 OBP) on top of usual elite pitching (7 W, 72 K, 3.69 ERA, 1.22 WHIP, 7 QS, 5 SV+H). Dey leadin' da league in W AND ranks 3rd in QS AND SV+H. Polar is 1-10 on da season — sha, dat's mathematically eliminated from a playoff push, I gar-on-tee. Last week Polar lost 3-11 to Spoons wit' 47 IP, 0 QS, 6.13 ERA, ooo wee, dat's a pitching staff held together by duct tape and prayer. ShawSwank gon' run away wit' pitching cats and da hitting cats too. Pick: ShawSwank by way of a fully-loaded shrimp po'boy from Domilise's, dat's true.
